testcase.name: ValidLogin

failure.message: Login failed expected [Welcome sowndariya] but found [Welcome username]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Login failed expected [Welcome sowndariya] but found [Welcome username] at com.TestNG.Selenium.TestNGParameter.ValidLogin(TestNGParameter.java:57) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 30 stack frames

testcase.name: InvalidUser
